
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rooster|kanji=癸酉|romaji=mizunoto tori|onyomi=kiyū|p=guǐyǒu|w=kuei-yu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 jau5|j=gwai2 jau5|ci=kʷɐi jɐu²|mc=kjwɨj jɨuX|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢʷɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|qq=}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Rooster (zodiac)|en|Rooster (zodiac)|qid=Q822621|lt=Rooster (酉)|1=Rooster (zodiac)}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal generates Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Rooster (癸酉)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: kiyuu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-yu (계유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

==Years of Yin Water Rooster==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 13 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Water Rooster (癸酉)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 13|en|AD 13|qid=Q23411|lt=13 AD|1=AD 13}}
* {{ill|AD 73|en|AD 73|qid=Q30402|lt=73 AD|1=AD 73}}
* {{ill|AD 133|en|AD 133|qid=Q31498|lt=133 AD|1=AD 133}}
* {{ill|193|en|193|qid=Q30300|lt=193 AD|1=193}}
* {{ill|253|en|253|qid=Q30913|lt=253 AD|1=253}}
* {{ill|313|en|313|qid=Q30882|lt=313 AD|1=313}}
* {{ill|373|en|373|qid=Q34551|lt=373 AD|1=373}}
* {{ill|433|en|433|qid=Q31160|lt=433 AD|1=433}}
* {{ill|493|en|493|qid=Q30987|lt=493 AD|1=493}}
* {{ill|553|en|553|qid=Q33719|lt=553 AD|1=553}}
* {{ill|613|en|613|qid=Q31032|lt=613 AD|1=613}}
* {{ill|673|en|673|qid=Q31105|lt=673 AD|1=673}}
* {{ill|733|en|733|qid=Q23570|lt=733 AD|1=733}}
* {{ill|793|en|793|qid=Q33470|lt=793 AD|1=793}}
* {{ill|853|en|853|qid=Q30367|lt=853 AD|1=853}}
* {{ill|913|en|913|qid=Q24860|lt=913 AD|1=913}}
* {{ill|973|en|973|qid=Q23754|lt=973 AD|1=973}}
|
* {{ill|1033|en|1033|qid=Q19321|lt=1033 AD|1=1033}}
* {{ill|1093|en|1093|qid=Q19474|lt=1093 AD|1=1093}}
* {{ill|1153|en|1153|qid=Q19646|lt=1153 AD|1=1153}}
* {{ill|1213|en|1213|qid=Q5261|lt=1213 AD|1=1213}}
* {{ill|1273|en|1273|qid=Q5526|lt=1273 AD|1=1273}}
* {{ill|1333|en|1333|qid=Q6004|lt=1333 AD|1=1333}}
* {{ill|1393|en|1393|qid=Q6390|lt=1393 AD|1=1393}}
* {{ill|1453|en|1453|qid=Q6469|lt=1453 AD|1=1453}}
* {{ill|1513|en|1513|qid=Q6200|lt=1513 AD|1=1513}}
* {{ill|1573|en|1573|qid=Q6678|lt=1573 AD|1=1573}}
* {{ill|1633|en|1633|qid=Q6870|lt=1633 AD|1=1633}}
* {{ill|1693|en|1693|qid=Q7689|lt=1693 AD|1=1693}}
* {{ill|1753|en|1753|qid=Q7621|lt=1753 AD|1=1753}}
* {{ill|1813|en|1813|qid=Q6937|lt=1813 AD|1=1813}}
* {{ill|1873|en|1873|qid=Q7757|lt=1873 AD|1=1873}}
* {{ill|1933|en|1933|qid=Q18726|lt=1933 AD|1=1933}}
* {{ill|1993|en|1993|qid=Q2065|lt=1993 AD|1=1993}}
|
* {{ill|2053 AD|ja|2053年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2053|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2053 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2113 AD|ja|2113年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2113|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2113 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2173 AD|ja|2173年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2173|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2173 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2233 AD|ja|2233年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2233|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2233 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2293 AD|ja|2293年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2293|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2293 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2353 AD|ja|2353年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2353|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2353 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2413 AD|ja|2413年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2413|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2413 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2473 AD|ja|2473年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2473|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2473 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 25世紀|1=25th century|qid=Q49839}}
* {{ill|2533 AD|ja|2533年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2533|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2533 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2593 AD|ja|2593年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2593|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2593 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2653 AD|ja|2653年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2653|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2653 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2713 AD|ja|2713年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2713|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2713 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2773 AD|ja|2773年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2773|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2773 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2833 AD|ja|2833年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2833|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2833 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2893 AD|ja|2893年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2893|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2893 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2953 AD|ja|2953年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2953|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2953 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}
==Months of Yin Water Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|qid=Q122|lt=August|1=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|qid=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|qid=Q1193124|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Hanlu}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Rooster==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11571306}}.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|癸酉|qq=Yin Water Rooster|qq=ja|qq=癸酉|qq=zh|5-癸酉|qq=ko|qq=계유|lt_ko=계유|qq=fr|qq=Coq de eau|qq=de|qq=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=simple|qq=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|version=98658201|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q655662|af|Waterhaan (astrologie)|cdo|Gŭi-iū|de|Wasser-Hahn|fr|Coq d'eau|hak|Kui-yû|ja|癸酉|ko|계유|nds|Water-Hahn|vi|Quý Dậu|za|Gveiqyoux|zh-min-nan|Kùi-iú|zh-yue|癸酉|zh|癸酉|zh-min-nan|Kui-chhiū|cdo|Kui-cṳ̄de|nds|Wasser-Hahnvi|de|Yin Water Rooster|fr|Coq de eau|de|Wasser-Hahneen|en|Water Rooster|fr|Coq de eauboishak|it|Kui-chṳ́id|za|Gueiceij|ar|Yin Water Rooster}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
